creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
Update on what may turn into a fork:
I've chosen a version number format.  I now call the version represented by the tarball "2024.1".  With the 3 patches applied, it's version 2024.4.  I'm currently working on 2025.1.

If you decide to adopt the changes so far, please also apply:
==========
--- calendar.c~  2024-09-10 19:54:24.346233000 -0400
+++ calendar.c   2025-01-19 20:16:32.131064000 -0500
@@ -50,3 +50,3 @@
 
-static const char version[] = "2024/9/12";
+static const char version[] = "2024.4";
 
==========
Thanks.

More regarding 2025.1 and more once the work is closer to done and tested, which I'm guessing is a week or two away (early February).
 -WBE
